name: Kura Oncology, Inc.
summary: Kura Oncology, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing targeted therapeutics for patients with genetically defined cancers. Its lead product, KOMZIFTI (ziftomenib), received FDA approval for adult patients with relapsed or refractory NPM1-mutated acute myeloid leukemia (AML). The company is pursuing additional indications for ziftomenib, including frontline AML and combination therapies, and has a collaboration with Kyowa Kirin Co., Ltd. for global development.
